calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Continued To Apr-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Young appeared by telephone for William Prater (Petitioner).

The Court questions why this is the right venue. Ms. Young stated that the Trustee lives in Los Altos, but the work is all being done in San Francisco County, that there are two pieces of property here that are being managed, that this is where the bank is located, and that the Settlor lived in San Francisco. Ms. Young also stated that her office is in San Francisco, that she is the one who is preparing the documents, that the Trustee would make several trips to the City when the Settlor was alive and that he was assisting the Settlor. The Court stated that the trust is in a position to keep it here and that there is a notice issue. Ms. Young stated that the notice that was issued in November had a copy of the petition attached to it, that she was told she had to use another document and that when she did, she did not resend the copy. Ms. Young also stated that the only person it would effect is the Petitioner as he is the remainder Beneficiary and that the Daughter of the Decedent acknowledged that she did receive a copy of the petition. The Court suggested doing another notice of hearing and serving a copy of the petition with it. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to April 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
